description: CZ discusses his prison experience, the lessons learned, and reflections on freedom and human connection. He shares insights on his sentencing and the subjective nature of fairness in legal judgments.
topic_summary: In this interview, CZ reflects on his time in prison, the impact on his life, and the importance of human connections. He addresses the fairness of his sentence and compares it to other cases in the financial sector [t=0:32-2:36].
